User Story: As a CLI user, I want to import NMEA format GPS data files, so that I can process my NMEA recorded lap data.
Remark: 支持标准NMEA 0183格式GPS数据解析，提取时间、坐标、速度信息

User Story: As a CLI user, I want to import VBO (VBox) format data files, so that I can process my VBox recorded lap data.
Remark: 支持VBox输出的VBO格式解析，提取完整传感器数据

User Story: As a developer, I want a unified internal data format for all imported data, so that the subsequent analysis logic can be consistent.
Remark:
定义统一的JSON内部数据结构，包含所有必要字段。
**如果不做：** 不同数据源导入的数据格式不一致，后续分析模块需要处理多种格式，代码重复且难以维护，扩展性差，添加新数据格式支持成本极高

User Story: As a CLI user, I want to batch import multiple data files in one command, so that I can quickly get lap information for all files.
Remark: 支持多个文件作为输入参数，一次性处理完成

User Story: As a CLI user, I want the system to automatically detect and split laps based on start/finish line, so that I don't need to manually split laps.
Remark: 根据GPS轨迹自动识别起点/终点线，切分出单个圈速

User Story: As a CLI user, I want to see a list of all detected laps with lap time information, so that I can quickly understand the file content.
Remark: 输出每个文件的圈数列表，显示每圈的圈时

User Story: As a CLI user, I want to compare two arbitrary laps from same or different files, so that I can analyze the differences between my two laps.
Remark: 支持跨文件对比任意两圈，输出对比结果

User Story: As a CLI user, I want to see the total lap time difference between the two compared laps, so that I can know which lap is faster.
Remark: 计算并显示总圈时差

User Story: As a CLI user, I want to see time difference by sector (track segment), so that I can know where I gained or lost time.
Remark: 基于赛道分段计算并显示分段时间差

User Story: As a CLI user, I want all commands to support single execution and exit mode, so that I can easily script and automate workflows.
Remark: 无交互式REPL，每个命令完成单个任务后退出，符合CLI工具设计哲学

User Story: As a CLI user, I want default human-readable text output to stdout, so that I can quickly understand results in terminal.
Remark: 默认输出易读的文本格式

User Story: As an automation user, I want all commands to support JSON output format, so that I can parse results with other programs.
Remark: 所有命令支持 `--json` 参数输出JSON，便于管道处理

User Story: As a user, I want to manage track metadata with dedicated CLI commands, so that I can configure my commonly used tracks.
Remark: 提供 `track list/info/add` 一组命令管理赛道数据

User Story: As a user, I want to list all configured tracks with basic information, so that I can see what tracks are available.
Remark: `late-brake track list` 命令，列出所有内置和自定义赛道

User Story: As a user, I want to see detailed information for a specific track, so that I can verify the track configuration.
Remark: `late-brake track info <track-id>` 命令，显示完整赛道信息

User Story: As a user, I want to add or update a track from a JSON file, so that I can add my own custom tracks.
Remark: `late-brake track add <file.json>` 命令，导入赛道JSON文件

User Story: As a user, I want the system to automatically match track based on GPS trace, so that I don't need to manually specify the track every time.
Remark: 自动将导入的GPS轨迹与已配置赛道进行匹配

User Story: As a user, I want to manually specify the track ID with `--track` parameter when automatic matching fails, so that I can still process the data.
Remark: 支持 `--track <track-id>` 参数手动指定赛道

User Story: As a user, I want built-in track metadata for common circuits, so that I can use the tool immediately without adding tracks myself.
Remark: 内置上海国际赛车场、珠海国际赛车场等常见赛道数据

User Story: As a user, I want speed difference comparison between two laps, so that I can analyze where I was faster or slower.
Remark: 按分段/弯道显示速度差异

User Story: As a developer, I need to define the track JSON format specification, so that users can correctly write custom track files.
Remark:
编写赛道数据格式文档，定义完整JSON结构。
**如果不做：** 用户无法正确理解格式要求，无法创建自定义赛道文件，自定义赛道功能不可用

User Story: As a developer, I need to define the internal data format specification, so that all modules use consistent data structures.
Remark:
编写内部数据格式文档。
**如果不做：** 不同模块开发时可能出现数据格式不兼容，导致模块间集成失败，增加调试难度

User Story: As a user, I want to manually adjust lap split points, so that I can correct automatic splitting errors.
Remark: v1不实现，后续迭代

User Story: As a user, I want to generate speed-distance curve data for visualization, so that I can draw charts in Excel or Python.
Remark: v1不实现，后续迭代

User Story: As a user, I want GPS trace visualization output, so that I can see the difference of racing lines on map.
Remark: v1不实现，后续迭代

User Story: As a user, I want the system to automatically identify the fastest lap in a file, so that I can quickly find my best performance.
Remark: v1不实现，后续迭代

User Story: As a racing driver, I want specialized braking point analysis between two laps, so that I can find the optimal braking point.
Remark: 这是产品核心诉求，但v1先做基础对比功能，后续迭代专门的刹车点分析

User Story: As a user, I want support for CSV format import, so that I can import data from other recorders.
Remark: v1只支持NMEA和VBO，后续迭代

User Story: As a user, I want support for AiM format import, so that I can import data from AiM devices.
Remark: v1只支持NMEA和VBO，后续迭代

User Story: As a user, I want GPS data smoothing and filtering, so that analysis results are more accurate.
Remark:
对原始GPS数据进行平滑处理，减少噪声干扰。
**如果不做：** GPS原始数据噪声较大，导致计算得到的速度和位置偏差较大，影响分析结果的准确性，可能误导驾驶改进方向
